description: Satudarah is a one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1990 in Moordrecht, Netherlands, by nine Moluccan friends. The club has been involved in violent crime, extortion, drug trafficking, and arms trafficking. It was banned in the Netherlands in 2018 and has chapters in numerous countries worldwide.
